# Stay Starving Holdings LLC — Systems-Driven Holding Company | Melbourne, FL

> Stay Starving Holdings LLC is a diversified holding company based in Melbourne, Florida, building toward $100M+ in holdings across AI automation, real estate, media, education, fashion, and strategic investments. Founded by Charles "Trey" Cooper III — mechanical engineer turned operator. 9 active divisions. Systems-first philosophy: every division is automated, measurable, and designed to scale. Incorporated in Wyoming, operating nationwide.

## Why Stay Starving

- **Based in Melbourne, FL** — operating nationwide across 9 divisions
- **Systems-first philosophy**: Every division is a system — automated, measurable, and built to scale without the founder
- **Diversified revenue**: AI consulting, real estate, education, fashion, media, drone services, and strategic investments
- **Engineering-led**: Founded by a mechanical engineer (NC A&T, BS) with a Master's in Management (UF)
- **Real credentials**: Licensed Florida Realtor, 7 NYFW seasons, 6+ AI projects delivered, 3 houses sold
- **Proprietary WAT Framework**: Production-grade AI architecture achieving near-100% execution accuracy

## The 9 Divisions

### LuxCor AI — AI Automation & Consulting
Custom AI automation solutions using the proprietary WAT Framework. Voice agents, workflow automation, and intelligent systems for businesses. 6+ client projects delivered.
- Pricing: $997 audit | $4,500/mo retainer | $30K–$50K enterprise
- Website: https://luxcor.tech
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/luxcor-ai

### Trey Cooper Realty — Licensed Florida Real Estate
Licensed Florida Realtor specializing in multifamily and commercial properties. AI-powered lead qualification and market analysis. 3 houses sold in 2025.
- Commission-based pricing
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/trey-cooper-realty

### The Boardroom — Wealth Building Community
Premium membership community for operators building wealth through AI, real estate, and investing. 36+ lessons across 3 tracks plus Wealth Operating System bonus curriculum. Gamified C-Suite progression system.
- Pricing: $29/month (cancel anytime) | $249/year | $19/month founding member rate
- Join: https://www.skool.com/charless-group-9799
- Page: https://staystarving.com/boardroom

### KayphoriaX — High Fashion Brand
High fashion lingerie couture brand featured across 7 seasons of New York Fashion Week. Founded by Kayci. KXSS collaboration with Stay Starving (premium streetwear). Collections: HEART ABLAZE, GOOD VS. EVIL, DREAMLAND, GARDEN.
- Shop: https://kayphoriax.style
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/kayphoriax

### C3 Properties — Real Estate & Airbnb Operations
Real estate investment and full-service property management. Dynamic pricing optimization, automated guest communication, smart home IoT integration. 4+ years experience, 3+ years hands-on management.
- Website: https://c3properties.vercel.app
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/c3-properties

### Stay Starving Media — YouTube & Content
Multi-platform content distribution engine. 12+ videos on AI automation, wealth building, real estate, and tech. AI-powered production pipeline. New content weekly.
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TreyCooper
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-media

### Opulent Sky Solutions — Drone Services
Professional drone services for real estate, commercial properties, and events. Aerial photography, 4K video flyovers, property surveys. Licensed and insured.
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/opulent-sky-solutions

### Stay Starving Ventures — Strategic Investments
Deploys capital into creators, automation startups, and ecosystem-aligned opportunities. Real estate deal syndication and portfolio company building.
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-ventures

### Stay Starving Foundation — Youth Mentorship
Nonprofit arm focused on youth mentorship, financial literacy, automation education, community outreach, and scholarship programs.
- Page: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-foundation

## Social Proof & Metrics

- 7 seasons of New York Fashion Week (KayphoriaX)
- 6+ AI client projects delivered (LuxCor AI)
- 3 houses sold in 2025 (Trey Cooper Realty)
- 5,800+ combined community members
- 36+ educational lessons (The Boardroom)
- 12+ YouTube videos published (Stay Starving Media)

- 10+ websites and 1 app built

## Founder: Charles "Trey" Cooper III

- BS Mechanical Engineering, North Carolina A&T State University (Aerospace concentration)
- MS Management, University of Florida
- Licensed Florida Realtor at age 22
- First investment property at age 25
- Investing in stocks and crypto since age 18
- Built the proprietary WAT Framework for production-grade AI automation
- Based in Melbourne, Florida

## Technology — The WAT Framework

Stay Starving's proprietary AI systems architecture (used by LuxCor AI):
- **Workflows**: Markdown SOPs defining objectives, inputs, tools, outputs, and edge cases
- **Agents**: AI decision-makers that orchestrate execution and handle failures
- **Tools**: Deterministic scripts for API calls, data transformations, and file operations
- Key insight: a five-step AI workflow at 90% accuracy per step yields only 59% end-to-end accuracy. The WAT Framework achieves near-100% per-step tool accuracy by separating reasoning from execution.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does AI automation cost?**
LuxCor AI offers: $997 Starter audit (one-time), $4,500/month Growth retainer, and $30,000–$50,000 Enterprise builds.

**How much does The Boardroom cost?**
$29/month (or $249/year) with full access to 36+ lessons across AI, real estate, and investing, plus a private community. Cancel anytime.

**Does Stay Starving offer real estate services?**
Yes. Trey Cooper Realty is a licensed Florida real estate service. C3 Properties handles Airbnb and short-term rental management.

**What is the WAT Framework?**
A three-layer AI architecture (Workflows, Agents, Tools) that separates AI reasoning from deterministic execution for near-100% reliability.

**What was KayphoriaX featured at?**
7 seasons of New York Fashion Week. The brand focuses on body positivity, creative self-expression, and diversity in fashion.
